category_sources: source_facts.description says create BitTorrent metainfo files; official GitHub wiki says mktorrent is a command-line utility to create BitTorrent metainfo files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mktorrent; official GitHub wiki title and repository use mktorrent.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub wiki, which documents features and building mktorrent.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/pobrn/mktorrent; per instruction, repo is not re-evaluated and returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GitHub wiki lists BitTorrent metainfo creation, trackers, private flag, web seed URLs, and multithreaded hashing.
